# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: batch-processor
        image: batch-processor:latest
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 10000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Always
